overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking through a scenic countryside during golden hour. The character travels from a dirt path through flowering meadows and dense bushes to reach a serene lakeshore with a snow-capped mountain backdrop.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through an open meadow filled with wildflowers and scattered trees

entered.detail: Large mountain with snow-covered peak dominating the background
Brown dirt trail winding through the grass and wildflowers
Deciduous trees with green summer foliage
Grass field with purple lavender and red poppy flowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through a wide-open meadow during golden hour. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance while scattered trees and colorful wildflowers line the path. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves through the tranquil rural landscape.

events.description: leaves the dirt path and enters tall grass and dense bushes
pushes through thick shrubbery as the lake becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt pushing through dense bushes and tall grass, moving off the beaten path toward the water

entered.detail: Thick green shrubbery and leafy undergrowth blocking the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dirt path behind, Geralt enters a denser area with tall grass and thick bushes. The sky becomes partially obscured by foliage as he pushes through the vegetation. The snow-capped mountain shifts to the left as the camera advances, and glimpses of water appear through the bushes ahead.

events.description: emerges from dense vegetation onto the open lakeshore
approaching and passing a wooden dock structure on the shoreline

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the sandy lakeshore with calm water to his right, approaching a wooden dock

entered.detail: Calm reflective water surface with gentle ripples
Sandy and pebble beach along the water's edge
Small wooden pier structure extending into the lake

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the bushes, the scene opens onto a beautiful lakeshore with the snow-capped mountain now centered in the background. Geralt walks along the sandy beach with calm water to his right. A wooden dock structure appears ahead and is passed along the way, while the mountain remains a constant majestic presence in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide-open rural meadow toward a serene, mountain-backed lakeshore during the golden hour. It begins with the camera following Geralt along a dirt path lined with colorful wildflowers and scattered trees, with snow-capped mountains looming in the far distance. As he leaves the path, the landscape tightens into a denser area of tall grass and thick bushes that partially obscure the sky before glimpses of water emerge through the foliage. The scene then opens wide as the character emerges from the vegetation onto a sandy beach, with the majestic mountain now centered in the background. Finally, the camera tracks along the calm water's edge, passing a wooden dock structure as the journey concludes by the lakeshore.
